metadata.description: Free Lovstudio skills — one-command install via `npx skills add lovstudio/skills`.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Scaffold new lovstudio skills with proper structure, SKILL.md + README.md.

plugins.name: skill-optimizer
plugins.description: Audit + auto-fix an existing skill, bump semver, and append a CHANGELOG entry.

plugins.name: image-creator
plugins.description: Multi-mechanism image generation: end-to-end AI, code rendering, or prompt engineering

plugins.name: visual-clone
plugins.description: Extract design DNA from reference images / 提取设计要素生成复刻指令

plugins.name: thesis-polish
plugins.description: MBA 论文全面润色，对标全国优秀论文标准。语言+结构+论证+创新四维提升。

plugins.name: translation-review
plugins.description: Chinese-to-English translation review. Compares source & translation across 6 dimensions.

plugins.name: fill-form
plugins.description: Fill Word form templates (.docx). Auto-detects table fields, CJK font support.

plugins.name: fill-web-form
plugins.description: Fill web forms from local knowledge base. Fetch URL → deep-search KB → generate markdown doc.

plugins.name: expense-report
plugins.description: Invoice images/text → categorized Excel expense report

plugins.name: review-doc
plugins.description: Review and annotate documents/contracts — output annotated docx with comments

plugins.name: any2pdf
plugins.description: Markdown → professionally typeset PDF. CJK/Latin mixed text, code blocks, tables, 14 themes.

plugins.name: any2docx
plugins.description: Convert Markdown documents to professionally styled DOCX (Word) files with python-docx.

plugins.name: any2deck
plugins.description: Content → slide deck images with 16 visual styles, PPTX/PDF export, branding overlay.

plugins.name: pdf2png
plugins.description: PDF → single vertically concatenated PNG. Uses macOS CoreGraphics, ~20x faster than pdftoppm.

plugins.name: png2svg
plugins.description: PNG → high-quality SVG conversion with background removal and spline curves.

plugins.name: anti-wechat-ai-check
plugins.description: 检测文章 AI 痕迹 + 人性化润色，通过微信 3.27 条款检测。

plugins.name: document-illustrator
plugins.description: 为文档原地插入 AI 配图。全局规划插入点，并行生成，异步插回原文。

plugins.name: auto-context
plugins.description: Context hygiene checker. Suggests /fork or /btw when context is polluted.

plugins.name: cc-migrate-session
plugins.description: Migrate Claude Code sessions when a project folder moves

plugins.name: deploy-to-vercel
plugins.description: Deploy frontend to Vercel with auto Cloudflare DNS + custom domain setup.

plugins.name: finder-action
plugins.description: Generate Mac Finder right-click menu actions. Quick Action or Finder Sync Extension.

plugins.name: gh-access
plugins.description: Grant / revoke / list collaborator access on private GitHub repos by username or email. Read-only by default.

plugins.name: gh-contribute
plugins.description: Contribute clean, professional PRs to upstream GitHub repos — fork, branch, commit, push, open PR, with smart splitting.

plugins.name: gh-tidy
plugins.description: Triage & clean up GitHub issues, PRs, branches, and labels in one pass.

plugins.name: obsidian-reset-cache
plugins.description: 重置 Obsidian 缓存，解决卡在 Loading cache 的问题。

plugins.name: project-port
plugins.description: Generate stable unique dev port (3000–8999) from project name.

plugins.name: xbti-creator
plugins.description: Create custom BTI personality tests (LBTI, FBTI, etc.) with AI-generated content + avatars.

plugins.name: xbti-gallery
plugins.description: Browse all community-created BTI personality tests at xbti.lovstudio.ai.
